message:
test(scheduler): zero-footprint NUMA slab rejects external status override

Adds test verifying that a NumaSlabPool with zero slab_footprint_bytes
correctly rejects external hugepage status overrides via set_hugepage_status,
falling back to inactive state with AlignmentMismatch reason rather than
accepting the forced status values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
